# Sash AI Forge

> Sash AI Forge takes an AI startup idea from first conversation to a live, launched product in 6 weeks. Founder brings the idea; we discuss, build together, and launch. Built for non-technical founders. Senior AI-native CTO included. Predictable, milestone-based pricing.

## Core promise
- 6 weeks. Idea discussion to launch. One continuous engagement, no vendor chains, no hand-offs.

## The reality (why most founders don't ship AI products)
- Can't find AI engineers (rare, expensive, already employed)
- Unclear product architecture (wrong choice now means costly rewrite when you raise)
- Slow, unpredictable dev cycles (agency timelines slip; freelancers ghost)
- No senior tech leader (wrong hires, wrong tools, wrong priorities)
Sash AI Forge closes these gaps.

## What we deliver in the 6 weeks
- A live, production-grade AI product
- A brand (logo, identity, site, socials)
- Senior AI-native CTO working alongside the founder
- Predictable milestone-based pricing

## The 4-step journey (from idea to launch)
- Step 1: Discuss the idea. We pressure-test it with you. You leave with a sharper thesis, not a pitch deck.
- Step 2: Architect and scope. AI architecture. Product scope locked. Every milestone priced up front.
- Step 3: Build together. Backend, AI pipelines, frontend. Weekly demos. Real users test early.
- Step 4: Launch. Production deploy. Brand live. First users on.

After launch (corollary, not part of the 6-week core): we stay on as your tech partner for as long as you need us, or step back the moment you're ready. Shipping features, scaling infra, hiring your team. You're never on your own.

## Who it's for
- Non-technical founders (first-time or repeat) launching AI-native startups
- Bootstrapped-to-seed stage, India and global
- Founders who value speed and completeness over consultant hours
- Founders who don't have months to wait

## How we work
- Co-founder mindset. We challenge weak ideas, propose better versions, own outcomes with you.
- Predictable pricing. Fixed price per milestone. You always know the next number before we ship it.
- Zero lock-in. 100% of the code and IP is yours. No retainers. No revenue share.
- Built for speed. 6 weeks to a live product. Senior team, no junior hand-offs, no ramp-up lag.
- Respects your runway. Tight on cash, strong on conviction? We discuss cash and equity blends.

## Additional services (on request, priced separately)
Not part of the core 6-week build. Available for founders who also need them:
- Company registration (India Pvt Ltd/LLP, Delaware C-Corp, Singapore, UAE)
- Trademark and IP filing
- Compliance and ops (GST, ROC, bank, payroll, contracts)
- Hiring and team (founding engineer, AI engineer, product)
- CTO in your meetings: we join your investor and customer meetings as your technology representative at CTO level. We answer hard technical questions and back your pitch with engineering credibility.

AIxplora Technologies Pvt Ltd, Bengaluru, India
